subject: big pothole on Rice Ave
body_clean: hey mayor, there's a nasty pothole right in front of 2401 Rice Ave, been there like two weeks. my car already took a hit. can someone come out and patch it?

subject: big pothole on Rice Ave
body_clean: Mr. Delgado, got your note. We have the 2400 block of Rice on our patch list for Thursday. Crew will be out with cold mix — if temps cooperate we'll do a hot patch to make it last. Appreciate the heads-up.

subject: missed garbage pickup Tuesday
body_clean: garbage truck skipped my block again tuesday (Rice Ave between 24th and 25th). bins have been out since 6am. this is the second time this month.

subject: missed garbage pickup Tuesday
body_clean: Hi Mr. Delgado, I've flagged this with our sanitation contractor and they'll send a makeup truck by end of day Wednesday. I'm also logging the prior miss so we can track this route. Sorry for the hassle.

subject: streetlight out on Rice near 25th
body_clean: the streetlight at Rice and 25th Ave has been dark for at least a week. pretty sketchy at night walking to the metra. can you get ComEd or whoever on it?

subject: streetlight out on Rice near 25th
body_clean: Ray, submitted the outage ticket to ComEd this morning — pole number 48-227. Their typical turnaround is 3 to 5 business days. I'll follow up if it drags past next week.

subject: streetlight out on Rice near 25th
body_clean: light's back on as of last night, thanks for getting on it

subject: car blocking my alley again
body_clean: same silver suv been parked at the mouth of the alley off rice ave (behind 2401) since yesterday morning. can't get my car out. no plates visible from my angle.

subject: car blocking my alley again
body_clean: Mr. Delgado, I've dispatched a patrol car to that alley. If the vehicle is blocking access, we'll issue a ticket and have it towed if the owner can't be reached. You can also call non-emergency at 708-555-0112 directly for situations like this.

subject: big branch down on Rice Ave sidewalk
body_clean: storm last night knocked a huge branch down on the sidewalk in front of 2420 Rice. basically impassable. someone's gonna trip on it.

subject: pothole opening up on 25th Ave
body_clean: yo there's a fresh pothole cracking open on 25th Ave just south of rice. looks like it's getting bigger with all the rain. heads up.

subject: recycling bin not picked up
body_clean: recycling bin sat out all day Friday on Rice Ave. truck came for regular garbage but not recycling. this normal or did i miss something?

subject: recycling bin not picked up
body_clean: Hi Ray, recycling and garbage run on separate trucks but same day for your block. Sounds like the recycling truck may have had a breakdown — contractor confirmed a makeup run for Monday morning. You can leave the bin out. Sorry about that.

subject: thanks for patching rice ave
body_clean: just wanted to say thanks, the potholes on rice got fixed and the road actually feels smooth now. good work.

subject: illegal dumping in alley off Rice
body_clean: someone dropped two old mattresses and a busted tv in the alley behind rice ave between 24th and 25th. been there three days, smells bad. who handles this?

subject: illegal dumping in alley off Rice
body_clean: Ray, Public Works will clean out that alley by end of the week. Illegal dumping is a $500 fine — if you have any info on who left it (a license plate, time you saw it appear), send it over and I'll loop in code enforcement.

subject: cracks forming on Rice Ave again
body_clean: the stretch of rice ave from 24th to 25th is full of long cracks. last winter was rough and it shows. before it gets cold again would be a good time to seal them.

subject: garbage schedule over the holiday week
body_clean: what's the garbage pickup schedule for the week of mlk day? don't want to miss it and have bins sitting out forever.

subject: garbage schedule over the holiday week
body_clean: Hi Ray, pickup runs one day late that week — so if your normal day is Tuesday it shifts to Wednesday. The holiday schedule is also posted on the Village website under Public Works. Thanks for asking before, not after!

subject: pothole on Eastern Ave near Washington
body_clean: there's a deep pothole on eastern ave just before you hit washington blvd. was driving through there this morning and it's a tire-eater. not on my normal street but figured you'd wanna know.

subject: no garbage truck today again
body_clean: it's 6pm thursday and no truck. whole block has bins out on rice. third time this summer. starting to feel like we're being skipped on purpose.

subject: no garbage truck today again
body_clean: Ray, I hear you — three times is too many and I'm personally following up with the contractor tonight. You should have a truck there by Friday morning. I'm also asking them to explain the pattern on your route. Thanks for staying on top of this.

subject: no garbage truck today again
body_clean: truck came friday morning. appreciate you stepping in mayor.

subject: bad pothole on Mannheim near St. Charles
body_clean: mannheim rd near the st charles intersection has a monster pothole, almost blew my tire. i know that might be the state's road but wanted to flag it anyway.

subject: broken sidewalk panel on Rice Ave
body_clean: there's a cracked-up sidewalk panel right in front of 2415 Rice, one corner is heaved up about two inches. somebody's gonna twist an ankle on it.

subject: rice ave looking good this spring
body_clean: just wanted to say the block looks better this spring — sidewalk got fixed, potholes patched, alley's clean. whatever you did it worked. thanks mayor.
